title: User Feedback Sentiment Triage
shortDescription: Classify feedback sentiment using NLP polarity scoring and surface actionable themes from negative feedback.
jobsToBeDone: Prioritize user feedback by sentiment to focus on what hurts most
Spot recurring pain points across qualitative feedback
Produce a data-backed summary for stakeholder reviews

inputs.label: Feedback Entries (one per line)
inputs.example:
Love the new update!
The app crashes every time I open settings.
Great customer service, very responsive.
Not intuitive to use at all.
Fast and reliable, best tool we have used.
Billing page is confusing and I was charged twice.
Search is broken on mobile, never returns results.
Onboarding was smooth, got started in minutes.
